keyEvents.text: Penalty missed. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot is close, but misses to the right.
Goal! Argentina 1, Austria 0. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Facundo Medina following a fast break.
Stefan Posch (Austria) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Argentina. Nicolás Otamendi replaces Cristian Romero because of an injury.
Substitution, Argentina. Julián Alvarez replaces Thiago Almada.
Substitution, Argentina. Nico González replaces Lautaro Martínez.
Substitution, Austria. Marco Friedl replaces David Alaba.
Substitution, Austria. Alexander Prass replaces Stefan Posch.
Substitution, Austria. Marko Arnautovic replaces Paul Wanner.
Facundo Medina (Argentina) is shown the yellow card.
Konrad Laimer (Austria) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Austria. Patrick Wimmer replaces Romano Schmid.
Substitution, Argentina. Leandro Paredes replaces Rodrigo De Paul.
Substitution, Argentina. Nicolás Tagliafico replaces Facundo Medina.
Substitution, Austria. Carney Chukwuemeka replaces Michael Gregoritsch.
Leandro Paredes (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Argentina 2, Austria 0. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot from the left side of the six yard box to the centre of the goal following a fast break.
Amir Al Ammari (Iraq) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! France 1, Iraq 0. Kylian Mbappé (France) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Michael Olise.
Substitution, Iraq. Ali Al Hamadi replaces Aymen Hussein because of an injury.
Goal! France 2, Iraq 0. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Ousmane Dembélé.
Substitution, Iraq. Rebin Sulaka replaces Zaid Tahseen.
Substitution, Iraq. Youssef Amyn replaces Zaid Ismael.
Goal! France 3, Iraq 0. Ousmane Dembélé (France) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Michael Olise with a through ball.
Substitution, France. Désiré Doué replaces Ousmane Dembélé.
Substitution, France. Rayan Cherki replaces Michael Olise.
Substitution, Iraq. Aimar Sher replaces Amir Al Ammari.
Substitution, Iraq. Marko Farji replaces Ibrahim Bayesh.
Substitution, France. Maghnes Akliouche replaces Bradley Barcola.
Substitution, France. Malo Gusto replaces Jules Koundé.
Substitution, France. Marcus Thuram replaces Kylian Mbappé.
Substitution, Norway. Marcus Pedersen replaces Julian Ryerson because of an injury.
Goal! Norway 1, Senegal 0. Marcus Pedersen (Norway) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the top right corner.
Substitution, Norway. Patrick Berg replaces Fredrik Aursnes.
Goal! Norway 2, Senegal 0. Erling Haaland (Norway) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Martin Ødegaard with a through ball following a fast break.
Goal! Norway 2, Senegal 1. Ismaïla Sarr (Senegal) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Sadio Mané.
Substitution, Senegal. Ismail Jakobs replaces El Hadji Malick Diouf.
Substitution, Senegal. Ibrahim Mbaye replaces Pape Gueye.
Goal! Norway 3, Senegal 1. Erling Haaland (Norway) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Patrick Berg.
Substitution, Senegal. Mory Diaw replaces Édouard Mendy because of an injury.
Substitution, Senegal. Pathé Ciss replaces Lamine Camara.
Substitution, Norway. Andreas Schjelderup replaces Antonio Nusa.
Substitution, Senegal. Pape Matar Sarr replaces Kalidou Koulibaly.
Substitution, Norway. Oscar Bobb replaces Alexander Sørloth.
Substitution, Norway. Leo Østigård replaces Torbjørn Heggem because of an injury.
Goal! Norway 3, Senegal 2. Ismaïla Sarr (Senegal) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Nicolas Jackson.
Goal! Jordan 1, Algeria 0. Nizar Al Rashdan (Jordan) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Mousa Al Tamari.
Ramiz Zerrouki (Algeria) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Algeria. Nabil Bentaleb replaces Ramiz Zerrouki.
Substitution, Algeria. Nadhir Benbouali replaces Hicham Boudaoui.
Husam Abu Dahab (Jordan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Jordan 1, Algeria 1. Nadhir Benbouali (Algeria) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Riyad Mahrez with a cross following a corner.
Substitution, Algeria. Anis Hadj Moussa replaces Riyad Mahrez.
Substitution, Jordan. Odeh Fakhoury replaces Mahmoud Al Mardi.
Goal! Jordan 1, Algeria 2. Amine Gouiri (Algeria) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal following a corner.
Substitution, Jordan. Ali Azaizeh replaces Mousa Al Tamari.
Substitution, Jordan. Mohammad Abu Hasheesh replaces Mohannad Abu Taha.
Substitution, Algeria. Jaouen Hadjam replaces Rayan Aït-Nouri.
Substitution, Algeria. Zineddine Belaïd replaces Amine Gouiri.
Substitution, Jordan. Saleem Obaid replaces Husam Abu Dahab.
Substitution, Jordan. Mohammad Abu Zraiq replaces Ali Olwan.
